meta.title: Prover Requirements | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Technical requirements and operational standards for becoming a Quantum Shield Prover

requirements.title: Prover Requirements
requirements.subtitle: Review the technical requirements, security standards, and operational requirements needed to participate as a Quantum Shield Prover.

stake.title: Stake Requirement
stake.description: Minimum collateral in ETH equivalent. Ensures network security.

hsm.title: HSM Certification
hsm.description: Hardware Security Module for SPHINCS+ key storage.

responseTime.title: Response Time
responseTime.description: Maximum response time for signing requests.

hsmCertification.title: HSM Certification
hsmCertification.description: Use HSM with FIPS 140-2 Level 3 or higher certification.

keyManagement.title: Key Management
keyManagement.description: Private keys must be generated and stored within HSM, non-exportable.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Multi-factor authentication and principle of least privilege access management.

auditLogging.title: Audit Logging
auditLogging.description: Maintain tamper-proof logs of all signing operations.

availability.title: Availability
availability.description: Maintain 99.9%+ uptime. Planned maintenance requires advance notice.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Regular backups and disaster recovery plan.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Rapid application of security patches (critical vulnerabilities within 24 hours).

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Maintain communication channels (Slack/Discord) with Quantum Shield team.

slashing.title: Slashing Risks
slashing.description: Provers risk losing a portion of their stake for misconduct or SLA violations. Slashing rates are determined by the severity of the violation and the number of simultaneous offenders.

minor.title: Minor Violations
minor.description: SLA violations, short downtime, minor response delays.

major.title: Major Violations
major.description: Extended downtime, repeated SLA violations, security incidents.

quadratic.title: Quadratic Slashing
quadratic.description: When multiple Provers violate simultaneously, slashing rates increase quadratically. This mechanism discourages collusion attacks and promotes decentralization. For example, while a single offender might face 1% slashing, 10 simultaneous offenders could face up to 100% slashing each.

cta.title: Meet the Requirements?
cta.description: If you meet the above requirements, start your Prover application. Review typically takes 3-5 business days.

meta.title: Prover Terms of Service | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Terms of Service for Quantum Shield Prover services

notice.title: Important Notice
notice.content: Please read these terms carefully. By applying as a Prover, you agree to all conditions outlined in this agreement. Pay particular attention to the sections regarding slashing risks and liability.

definitions.title: Definitions
definitions.content:
"Prover" refers to an entity providing signing services on the Quantum Shield network.

"Stake" refers to the collateral deposited by a Prover to the network.

"Slashing" refers to the confiscation of stake due to violations or misconduct.

"HSM" refers to Hardware Security Module, used for secure storage of SPHINCS+ private keys.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.content:
To participate as a Prover, you must meet the following requirements:

• Be a legal entity
• Pass KYB (Know Your Business) verification
• Stake minimum $400,000 equivalent in ETH
• Possess FIPS 140-2 Level 3 or higher certified HSM
• Have infrastructure capable of maintaining 99.9%+ uptime

obligations.title: Prover Obligations
obligations.content:
Provers are obligated to:

• Respond to signing requests within 30 seconds
• Maintain 99.9%+ uptime
• Apply security updates promptly
• Report incidents immediately
• Maintain communication with Quantum Shield team
• Cooperate with audit requests

staking.title: Staking
staking.content:
Provers must stake minimum $400,000 equivalent in ETH.

• Stake is locked in smart contract upon approval
• Stake serves as collateral for misconduct and SLA violations
• Stake withdrawal requires 21-day waiting period
• Stake remains subject to slashing during waiting period

slashing.title: Slashing
slashing.content:
The following actions are subject to slashing:

【Minor Violations (1-5%)】
• SLA violations (uptime below 99.9%)
• Response time exceeded (over 30 seconds)

【Major Violations (5-25%)】
• Extended downtime
• Repeated SLA violations
• Security incidents

【Critical Violations (25-100%)】
• Invalid signature generation
• Collusion
• Intentional sabotage

【Quadratic Slashing】
When multiple Provers violate simultaneously, slashing rates increase quadratically.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content:
Provers may voluntarily exit with 21 days notice.

Quantum Shield may immediately terminate in cases of:
• Serious violations
• Discovery of misconduct
• False KYB information

Slashing provisions remain effective after termination.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content:
To the maximum extent permitted by law, Quantum Shield is not liable for:

• Losses due to cryptocurrency price fluctuations
• Losses from stake slashing
• Damages caused by third parties
• Indirect or consequential damages

Provers operate services at their own risk and are encouraged to obtain appropriate insurance.

modifications.title: Modifications
modifications.content:
Quantum Shield reserves the right to modify these terms.

• Significant changes will be notified 30 days in advance
• Continued service after changes constitutes acceptance
• Exit procedures are available if you disagree with changes

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By applying as a Prover, you agree to all conditions above. Please contact us before applying if you have any questions.

meta.title: Become a Prover | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Join the quantum-resistant validator network and earn while securing the future

hero.title: Become a Prover
hero.description: Join the quantum-resistant validator network. Earn competitive rewards while helping secure cross-chain assets with SPHINCS+ signatures.

about.title: What is Quantum Shield?
about.description: Quantum Shield is a next-generation asset protection protocol designed for the quantum computing era. Provers form the core of this ecosystem, safeguarding user assets through SPHINCS+ signatures.

step1.title: Quantum-Resistant Signatures
step1.description: Using post-quantum cryptographic algorithms like SPHINCS+ and Dilithium, we provide signatures resistant to attacks from quantum computers.

step2.title: Distributed Prover Network
step2.description: Multiple Provers operate independently, eliminating single points of failure. The 24-hour waiting period and multi-signature requirements prevent unauthorized asset transfers.

step3.title: Rewards & Incentives
step3.description: Through signature fees and performance bonuses, Provers can earn sustainable returns while contributing to network security.

consumer.title: Consumer App
consumer.description: Application for everyday users to lock assets and receive quantum-resistant protection.

tokenomics.title: QS Token
tokenomics.description: Lock QS tokens to obtain veQS. A portion of Prover rewards is distributed in QS tokens.

governance.title: Governance
governance.description: Changes to Prover requirements and protocol upgrades are decided by veQS holder voting.

requirements.title: What You Need
requirements.description: Technical requirements for becoming a Quantum Shield Prover

stake.title: Stake Requirement
stake.description: Minimum stake in ETH equivalent. Collateral for network security.

hsm.title: HSM Requirement
hsm.description: Hardware Security Module for SPHINCS+ key storage.

sla.title: SLA Requirement
sla.description: Uptime and maximum response time requirements.

calculator.title: ROI Calculator
calculator.description: Estimate your potential earnings as a Prover
calculator.realTimeHint: Results update in real-time as you type

slashing.title: Quadratic Slashing Risk
slashing.description: Slashing penalties increase quadratically if multiple Provers commit the same violation. This mechanism strongly discourages collusion.

cta.title: Ready to Join the Network?
cta.description: Start your application today. The review process typically takes 3-5 business days.

expertQuotes.title: Why STARK Proofs Matter
expertQuotes.subtitle: Insights from cryptography experts

quotes.quote: STARK proofs are a revolutionary technology that achieves both transparency and verifiability. They are paving the way for the future of trustless proof systems.
quotes.author: Eli Ben-Sasson
quotes.title: StarkWare Co-founder

quotes.quote: Zero-knowledge proofs are the only technology that can achieve both privacy and scalability. They will become the core of future blockchain infrastructure.
quotes.author: Vitalik Buterin
quotes.title: Ethereum Co-founder

quotes.quote: Decentralized proof networks enable true decentralization without relying on centralized oracles. Provers are a crucial component of this system.
quotes.author: ZK Researcher
quotes.title: Cryptography Researcher

expertQuotes.disclaimer: The above is for informational purposes only. Please participate as a Prover at your own discretion.

step4.title: Review Application
step4.description: Please review your information before submitting

form.businessIdPlaceholder: e.g., Corporate Number, EIN, Company Registration Number
form.businessIdHint: Varies by country: Japan uses Corporate Number (13 digits), US uses EIN, UK uses Company Registration Number, Singapore uses UEN, etc.
form.requiredDocumentsHint: Please submit one of the following: Certificate of Incorporation, Business License, Company Registration Certificate, or equivalent official document (issued within 6 months)
form.agreeTerms: I have read and agree to the Prover Terms of Service and understand the slashing risks involved.
form.agreeKyb: I consent to KYB (Know Your Business) verification and agree to provide additional documentation if requested.
form.agreeStake: I understand that a minimum stake of $400,000 equivalent in ETH is required, and this stake is subject to

review.reviewNote: After submission, your application will be reviewed by our team. This process typically takes 3-5 business days.

submitted.title: Application Submitted!
submitted.description: Thank you for applying to become a Quantum Shield Prover. Our team will review your application within 3-5 business days.
submitted.saveIdNote: Please save this ID - you'll need it to check your application status.
submitted.emailSentNote: Your application ID and details will also be sent to your registered email address.

result.reviewingDocuments: Document review in progress (3-5 business days)

descriptions.documentsConfirmed: All required documents have been confirmed
descriptions.reviewingInfrastructure: Reviewing infrastructure configuration and operational readiness

infrastructureRedundancy.title: Infrastructure Redundancy Configuration
infrastructureRedundancy.content: Please explain the failover continuity for signature processing in your server configuration described in the application. Specifically, please provide the acceptable latency values for SPHINCS+ signature generation and the switchover time in case of failure.

securityAudit.title: Security Audit Report

securityAudit.answer: We have attached the third-party audit report conducted in February 2026. (audit_report_2026_02.pdf)

help.title: Need Help?

meta.title: Operations Dashboard | Quantum Shield
meta.description: Prover operations dashboard for monitoring signatures and performance

dashboard.title: Operations Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Process signature requests and monitor your performance.

alert.slaWarning: SLA Warning: Response Time Approaching Threshold

viewMetrics.title: View Performance
viewMetrics.description: Check response time, success rate & uptime

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem Links
ecosystem.description: Manage QS tokens and participate in governance.

empty.title: No Pending Requests
empty.description: There are currently no signature requests in the queue. New requests will appear here automatically.

confirm.title: Confirm SPHINCS+ Signature
confirm.description: You are about to sign this request with your SPHINCS+ key. This action cannot be undone.

success.title: Signature Complete!
success.description: The request has been successfully processed.

batch.title: Confirm Batch Signature
batch.description: You are about to sign {count} requests with your SPHINCS+ key.

metrics.title: Performance & Rewards
metrics.description: View your signature processing performance and reward trends.

stats.uptimeDescription: The percentage of time your system was operational. SLA compliance requires 99.9% or higher.

withdraw.title: Withdraw Rewards
withdraw.description: Withdraw your earned rewards to your wallet. Your stake amount remains intact.
withdraw.feeNotice: Approximately 0.002 ETH equivalent is required for gas fees. Transaction may take a few minutes to complete.

reinvest.title: Reinvest Rewards to Stake
reinvest.description: Add your earned rewards to your stake to earn more rewards.
reinvest.benefitNotice: Increasing your stake allows you to receive more signature requests and earn more rewards.

alerts.title: Alerts & Stake Management
alerts.description: Monitor system warnings and manage your stake status.

whatIsAlert.title: What are alerts?
whatIsAlert.description: Alerts notify you when situations requiring attention occur in the system. Critical (red) requires immediate action, Warning (yellow) recommends early review, and Info (blue) is for reference. Unresolved alerts may lead to SLA violations and stake slashing.

whatIsStaking.title: What is staking?
whatIsStaking.description: Staking is a mechanism where you deposit QS tokens as collateral to guarantee your activity as a Prover. If you operate normally, you earn rewards, but SLA violations or misconduct may result in slashing (collateral confiscation).

empty.title: No alerts
empty.description: There are no alerts requiring attention. The system is operating normally.

signatureTimeout.title: Signature Timeout Warning
signatureTimeout.description: Signature request processing is taking longer than usual. Risk of SLA violation.
signatureTimeout.hint: Check the signature queue and prioritize processing this request.

systemResource.title: System Resource Warning
systemResource.description: CPU usage exceeds 80%. May affect signature processing performance.
systemResource.hint: Consider stopping unnecessary processes or scaling up your server.

maintenanceComplete.title: Scheduled Maintenance Complete
maintenanceComplete.description: Scheduled system maintenance has completed successfully. All services are operational.

risk.title: Risk Meter
risk.description: Your risk level increases with violations, raising the likelihood of slashing.

slashing.title: Quadratic Slashing Mechanism
slashing.description: Penalties increase exponentially as violations accumulate. It is crucial to avoid multiple violations.
slashing.userFriendlyDescription: The percentage of stake confiscated increases dramatically with repeated violations. For example, 1 violation results in 10%, but the 2nd violation means 40%, 3rd is 90%, and 4 or more leads to full confiscation plus disqualification. Careful daily operations to prevent violations are essential.
slashing.formulaDesc: N = Number of violations in past 90 days

addStake.title: Add Stake
addStake.description: Deposit additional QS tokens as stake to increase your risk tolerance.

withdraw.title: Withdraw Rewards
withdraw.description: Withdraw your earned rewards to your wallet. Your stake amount remains intact.
withdraw.feeNotice: Approximately 0.002 ETH equivalent is required for gas fees. Transaction may take a few minutes to complete.

processing.title: Processing...
processing.description: Processing your transaction. Please wait a moment.

complete.stakeDescription: Your stake has been successfully added. The new stake amount will be reflected on your dashboard.
complete.withdrawDescription: Your rewards have been successfully withdrawn. They will appear in your wallet once the transaction is confirmed.

actions.title: Stake Operations
actions.description: Add stake, withdraw rewards, or request to exit.

addStake.title: Add Stake
addStake.description: Deposit additional collateral to increase risk tolerance

challenge.title: Challenge Response
challenge.description: Respond to violation reports from Watchers and review past challenge history.

whatIsChallenge.title: What is a challenge?
whatIsChallenge.description: A challenge is a violation report issued when a network Watcher detects a problem with your signature processing. When challenged, you must submit a defense within 24 hours. If your defense is accepted, the challenge is dismissed. Otherwise, a portion of your stake will be slashed.

empty.title: No challenges
empty.description: There are no challenges requiring your attention. Continue maintaining normal operations.

notification.title: Challenge Notification
notification.whatThisMeansDesc: A problem has been reported with your signature processing. If left unaddressed, a portion of your stake will be confiscated. Review the details and submit a defense if you believe there was no issue.
notification.accusationContentHint: Details of the issue detected by the Watcher.
notification.accusationText: Invalid signature detected for request {requestId}. The following error occurred during signature verification:
notification.signatureLength: Signature Length: expected {expected} bytes, actual {actual} bytes
notification.verificationNodes: Verified by {count}/{count} Watcher nodes with same error.
notification.step1: Review the accusation content and attached evidence
notification.step2: Gather server logs and signature generation records
notification.step3: Create and submit your defense in the Defense tab

defense.title: Submit Defense Statement
defense.titleHint: Submit a rebuttal to the challenge. Valid defenses will result in dismissal.

guidance.title: Defense Tips
guidance.description: Provide specific technical explanations and attach evidence such as server logs and signature generation records. If there were causes beyond your control, such as network failures or system errors, documentation proving this is helpful.

defense.contentHint: Explain what happened and why you believe there was no issue.
defense.placeholder: Provide a detailed defense against the challenge. Include technical explanations, situation descriptions, and evidence for your rebuttal.
defense.evidenceHint: Server logs, signature generation records, network status screenshots, etc.
defense.uploadInstruction: Drag and drop files or click to upload
defense.warning: Once submitted, defense cannot be modified. Please review carefully before submitting.

result.dismissedDescription: Your defense was accepted and the challenge has been dismissed. No slashing will occur.

history.title: Challenge History
history.description: Review past challenges and their outcomes.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings, notifications, and security preferences.

profile.languageDescription: Select your display language. Changes take effect immediately.

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.description: Configure how you receive alerts and reports.

slaWarning.title: SLA Warnings
slaWarning.description: Get notified when at risk of SLA violations

challengeAlert.title: Challenge Alerts
challengeAlert.description: Get instant notifications for new challenges

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Enable two-factor authentication to enhance your account security.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage API keys for external system integration.

ipWhitelist.title: IP Whitelist
ipWhitelist.description: Restrict signature requests to allowed IP addresses.

exit.title: Prover Exit Request
exit.description: End your activity as a Prover and withdraw your stake

warning.title: Pre-Exit Checklist
warning.lockPeriodDesc: Stake is locked for minimum 180 days. Early exit incurs a penalty.
warning.pendingRequestsDesc: Signature requests in queue must be completed after exit request.
warning.unresolvedChallengesDesc: Exit request is not allowed if there are ongoing challenges.
warning.rewardsDesc: Unclaimed rewards will be automatically transferred upon exit.

penalty.title: Early Exit Penalty
penalty.description: Early exit within lock period (180 days) incurs an early release penalty.

form.title: Exit Request Form
form.commentPlaceholder: Please share your reason for exit or any feedback...

confirm.penalty: I understand that early exit penalty (${amount}) will be applied.
confirm.activityEnd: I understand that after exit request, no new signature requests will be accepted and my Prover activity will end.
confirm.coolingPeriod: I understand that stake will be returned after the cooling period (7 days).

complete.title: Exit Complete
complete.description: Your activity as a Prover has officially ended. Thank you for your participation.

queueProcessing.title: Processing Signature Queue
queueProcessing.description: Processing pending signature requests. Please wait until all requests are completed.

coolingPeriod.title: Cooling Period
coolingPeriod.description: For security purposes, a 7-day cooling period is required. Stake withdrawal is not available during this period.
coolingPeriod.notice: During the cooling period, you may still be subject to slashing if there are unresolved challenges.

thankYou.title: Thank you for using Quantum Shield
thankYou.description: If you wish to rejoin in the future, you are welcome to apply anytime.
